name: Finnish
modelReview: blind 3-persona Sonnet panel + round-trip comprehension over the spanning set (17 patterns, 2026-06-24): round-trip 17/17 correct, but naturalness misses the beta bar — overall median 4 with 8/17 items at or below 3 (two at 2); all three personas flag the compound day-of-month/day-of-week/month "tai"-rakenne for scope ambiguity and stacked-qualifier awkwardness.
note: EXPERIMENTAL — correct but not consistently idiomatic on compound schedules. The renderer round-trips every spanning-set pattern (the meaning is right), but the blind Sonnet panel found a systematic naturalness defect in the OR/compound "tai"-rakenne and in stacked month-weekday-hour qualifiers. Re-promote to beta after the compound-rendering fix and a re-review.
